title: Ghazals: The Beloved's Face
description: Hafiz on the face of the Beloved — human or divine, wine or worship, the ambiguity is the point.
introduction: Hafiz on the face of the Beloved — human or divine, wine or worship, the ambiguity is the point.

translation.text: If the Beloved should lay the mirror of beauty bare, every face would reflect only the Beloved's face.
